name: Bryce
text: Hey! Recycling also helps fight climate change by lowering carbon emissions.

name: Bryce
text: When factories reuse materials, they burn less fuel and release fewer greenhouse gases.

name: Bryce
text: Organic waste like food scraps can even be turned into compost instead of ending up in landfills.

name: Bryce
text: Electronic waste is especially important to recycle because it contains valuable metals.

name: Bryce
text: Glass, metal, paper, and plastic all have different recycling processes.

name: Bryce
text: Learning how to sort waste correctly is one of the easiest ways to help the environment.

name: Bryce
text: Together, small daily actions can create a much cleaner future.
